title: Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple, located in Kanjany in Thrissur district of Kerala.
overview.description: Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple, located in Kanjany in Thrissur district of Kerala. This temple is a classic example of the Dravidian style of architecture. Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple is situated near to Karuvannur River and the presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in main sanctum sanatorium facing east. According to folklore, sage Parasurama has installed the idol.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Karamuck
topPlaces.description: Karamuck is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Manaloor
topPlaces.description: Manalur is a small village in Thrissur district of Kerala state, south India. It is one of the constituencies in Thrissur district.

topPlaces.name: Vadanappally
topPlaces.description: Vatanappally (Vatanappilly/) is a panchayat and census town in Thrissur district, in the state of Kerala, India. Vatanapally is a small coastal village on the coastal belt of Thrissur district, about 19 km (12 mi) from Thrissur town.

topPlaces.name: Enamakkal Lake
topPlaces.description: Enamakkal Lake is a fresh water lake situated in Enamakkal of Thrissur District in Kerala State, India. The lake covers about 25 square kilometres.

topPlaces.name: Puzhakkal River
topPlaces.description: Puzhakkal River is a westward flowing river in Thrissur District of Kerala State in India. It originates from Killannoor Hills and empties into Thrissur Kole Wetlands.

topPlaces.name: Padiyam
topPlaces.description: Padiyam is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Anthikad Karthyayani Temple
topPlaces.description: Anthikad Karthyayani Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Anthikad, Thrissur district of Kerala, India. Cochin Devaswom Board controls the temple.

topPlaces.name: Arimpur
topPlaces.description: Arimpur is a small village located in Thrissur District of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thrikkunnathu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karamuck, Manaloor, Vadanappally, Enamakkal Lake, Puzhakkal River.
